# Gitavale

> Turn any Git repository into an LLM-ready digest instantly.

Gitavale is a SaaS designed to parse, chunk, and package GitHub repositories into optimized context files for Large Language Models.

## For AI Agents

As an AI agent, you can directly interact with Gitavale using our official CLI, rather than attempting to navigate the web application.

### Using the Gitavale CLI
The Gitavale CLI (`cli-anything-gitavale`) is an Agent-Native tool built with the cli-anything methodology. It supports structured JSON output.

1. **Wait for installation**: If `cli-anything-gitavale` is not in your PATH, you can install it from the repository source: `pip install -e cli-anything-gitavale/`
2. **Authentication**: `cli-anything-gitavale auth login --key <API_KEY>`
3. **Analyze a repo**: `cli-anything-gitavale --json analyze <github_url> -o digest.txt`
4. **Interactive REPL**: You can drop into the interactive shell by running `cli-anything-gitavale` without arguments.

### Direct API Access
If you prefer not to use the CLI, you can hit our API directly:
- **Analyze**: `POST https://gitaval.vercel.app/api/analyze` 
  - Body: `{"url": "https://github.com/..."}`
  - Headers: `Authorization: Bearer <API_KEY>`, `Content-Type: application/json`

## Additional Resources
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/Creativityliberty/gitaval)
- [Official Website](https://gitaval.vercel.app/)
